{{Infobox character
| name = Andel Petronus
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
| name = Andel Petronus
| aliases = Andel
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Quartermaster, Calder's second-in-command, Luminian Pilgrim, Imperial officer, Navigator, aide and supervisor to Calder Marten
| abilities = projects white light from his outstretched hand
| affiliations = The Testament, Luminian Order, Calder's crew, Navigator’s Guild
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Andel Petronus Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel Petronus is the [[Quartermaster]] and second-in-command to [[Calder]] [[Marten]]. A [[Heartlander]] with dark skin, he is frequently seen wearing a spotless white suit and hat, along with a silver [[White Sun pendant]]. He is characterized as a calm, resolute, and experienced individual who often serves as a voice of reason or a defender of the innocent. Despite his composed demeanor, he is capable of great enthusiasm and decisive action, such as commanding the crew during emergencies or utilizing weapons like a [[sword]] and pistol. He is a long-time traveling companion of [[Calder]]'s and maintains a close, protective relationship with the alchemist [[Petal]]. While some view him as a permanent fixture of [[Calder's ship]], he has also expressed interest in administrative roles within the Witnesses.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|As the [[Quartermaster]] and second-in-command of [[The Testament]], Andel Petronus is [[Calder]] [[Marten]]'s oldest traveling companion and a former [[Luminian Pilgrim]]. Often seen in a white suit and hat with a silver amulet carved with the [[White Sun]] crest, he provides navigational input and is known for being difficult to dissuade. During his travels, Andel has engaged in combat by skewering a creature and shooting a bullet into the belly of the [[Child of Nakothi]]. While accompanying [[Calder]] on various vessels, he expressed concerns regarding the [[Elders]] and warned [[Calder]] against marrying [[Jerri]]. Ultimately, Andel executed Naberius by shooting him in the forehead with a pistol.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is a person [[Calder]] mentions in relation to potentially shooting him.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Andel Petronus]] is the [[Quartermaster]] of [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Andel Petronus]] wears a white suit.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Andel Petronus]] wears a silver amulet carved with the [[White Sun]] crest of the [[Luminian Order]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is the [[Quartermaster]] and [[Calder]]'s oldest traveling companion.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel drank wine.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel drew a pistol.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is tired.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel wears a full white suit and hat.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is a character who would be praying at this point in time.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel provides occasional input to [[Calder]]'s navigation.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is the [[Quartermaster]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Andel Petronus]] is a man who is not easily dissuaded.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is a character who skewered a creature through the chest.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel has a new [[sword]] that does not fit in its sheath.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel wears a white suit.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is the [[Quartermaster]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel was once a [[Luminian Pilgrim]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel wears a silver pendant.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Andel Petronus]] is [[Calder]]'s quartermaster.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Andel Petronus]] is on Cheska's ship for reasons known only to him and his [[Luminian God]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is a character sitting in a rowboat with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is a character who speaks quietly to [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is a person [[Calder]] thinks might be able to help.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel was invited onto a [[Navigator]]’s vessel to meet with Naberius' backers.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is a crewmember whose suit was stained and hat was missing.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel did not approve of Naberius being gagged and tied to the mast.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is a member of the crew who shuffles cards to keep his hands occupied.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is accompanying [[Calder]] [[Marten]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel believes the [[Elders]] would feed on the chaos of an empty throne.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] tossed his hat to Andel.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is present in the hallway with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel warned [[Calder]] not to marry [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is with [[Calder]] and Foster.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel shot a bullet into the [[Child of Nakothi]]'s belly.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel once carried Naberius.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel joined [[Calder]] on the deck.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel is [[Calder]]'s second-in-command.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel executed Naberius by shooting him in the forehead with a pistol.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Andel was not present on the deck of [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Andel is [[Calder]] [[Marten]]'s second-in-command and a [[Heartlander man]] wearing all white.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|An [[Imperial]] officer and former scribe for the [[Order]], Andel Petronus serves as an aide, supervisor, and crew member to [[Calder]] [[Marten]]. While serving on the ship known as [[The Testament]], he manages the vessel's course and maintains a miserly grip on [[Calder]]'s finances. Despite his past devotion to the law and his history as a [[Pilgrim]], he is currently an [[Imperial]] prisoner under the supervision of the [[Navigator’s Guild]]. A highly skilled [[Navigator]] with decades of combat experience, Andel often resolves issues before [[Calder]] notices them and has demonstrated his prowess by firing upon the [[Elderspawn]] and launching alchemical charges at massive shadows. He eventually accompanies [[Calder]] and Foster to test the [[Optasia]] while wearing a [[White Sun medallion]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel emerged from below deck carrying wine and a basket of food.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel is a member of [[Calder]]'s crew who shouts orders.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Andel Petronus]] is an [[Imperial]] officer.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel has been plotting the ship's course for six weeks.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel is a man on the ship who was staring at fires.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel refers to [[The Testament]] as his ship.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel led [[Calder]] through the palace hallways.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel's full name is [[Andel Petronus]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel used to work as a scribe for the [[Order]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel is highly skilled and often fixes problems before [[Calder]] realizes they exist.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel did not panic upon reading the journal.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel reacted to the [[Elderspawn]] with a gunshot.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Andel Petronus]] is an [[Imperial]] prisoner under the supervision of the [[Navigator’s Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Andel Petronus]] is a [[Navigator]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Andel Petronus]] has decades of combat experience.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel is with [[Calder]] and Foster to test the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel wears the pure white of a [[Luminian Pilgrim]] and has a silver sun emblem on his chest.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel is part of [[Calder]]'s crew.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel is someone who keeps a miserly grip on [[Calder]]'s money.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel lit the fuse and launched an alchemical charge at a whale-sized shadow.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Andel Petronus]] was once passionately devoted to the law.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Andel Petronus]] is a member of [[Calder]]'s crew acting as backup with a seat on the opposite side of the arena.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel is present and speaks to the group.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel is tasked with taking [[Calder]] ashore.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel is a crew member on [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Andel Petronus]] is a crew member who can fight.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel wears a [[White Sun medallion]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel is a former [[Pilgrim]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Andel is an aide and supervisor to [[Calder]] [[Marten]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Andel Petronus]] is [[Marten]]'s [[Quartermaster]] and second-in-command.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Andel Petronus]] is a man in white and a quartermaster.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Andel Petronus]]'s intent is described as curiosity, anticipation of danger, and dry amusement.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A former [[Pilgrim]] and quartermaster who was not a [[Soulbound]], Andel Petronus is a wanted fugitive of the [[Luminian Order]] and a man hired to work on a noble family's estate. While carrying a pistol and two medallions, including a [[White Sun]], he was swallowed alive by an Elder Slither creature. After being released from the mouth of the beast, he sat with [[Jerri]] and later assisted in driving citizens to a guarded checkpoint. While serving as one of [[Calder]]'s last crew members aboard [[The Testament]], he addressed the imperial figure with a shaky voice and noted [[Calder]]'s emotional state. During his time on the ship's deck, he whispered '[[Light]] and life' and projected white light from his outstretched hand.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] believes Andel would know what to do regarding Jyrine's situation.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel spoke gently but relentlessly.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel carries a pistol and a [[White Sun medallion]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is sleeping in the main room.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel was swallowed by a frog-like creature.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Andel Petronus]] was swallowed and likely killed by a Slither.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel was released from the mouth of an Elder creature.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is sitting with [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel adjusted his hat.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel was swallowed alive.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is reciting a list.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is a man who was hired to work on a noble family's estate.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel possesses two medallions around his neck.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is a quartermaster and a former [[Pilgrim]] who was not a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is not technically a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is a wanted fugitive of the [[Luminian Order]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is in charge of driving citizens to a guarded checkpoint.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel addressed [[Calder]] as [[Your Imperial Highness]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel's voice was shaky.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel asked if [[Calder]] would recover.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is on the ramp of [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is on the deck of [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is a character who pointed out that [[Calder]] had moved to tears twice recently.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel was seated on the deck without his hat.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel whispered '[[Light]] and life'.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel projects white light from his outstretched hand.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel possesses a [[White Sun]] on his chest.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is one of [[Calder]]'s last crew members.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel is a character who showed little reaction to [[Petal]]'s gasp.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Andel watched Foster's story.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"Only if you plan on shooting Andel, which I would wholeheartedly support."<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Calder sighed and turned to face his Quartermaster. “Mister Petronus, what seems to be the problem?”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“How do you expect the Elders to respond to an empty throne? They would feed on the chaos.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Imperial prisoner,” Andel corrected, “under the supervision and probation of the Navigator’s Guild.”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Shut up, Andel!” Calder said, as he’d said a thousand times on the ship.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Luminian Order]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
